product.name: UploadCheck.app
product.tagline: Quality check videos, podcasts, and clips before you upload.
product.one_liner: UploadCheck gives creator agents a final pre-upload QC pass for video, podcast, and clip exports.

launch_copy.headline: Catch upload mistakes before your audience does
launch_copy.maker_comment: We built UploadCheck from real production failures: duplicate AI characters, frozen frames, low-contrast captions, garbled audio, unsafe Shorts text, canvas gutters, and agent repair loops. The product gives agents a callable QC gate before the upload button.
launch_copy.short_description: Run /check from an agent workspace or call the API before publishing. UploadCheck returns verdicts, timestamped flags, source-hash proof, marker exports, cost estimates, and repair-loop instructions.
proof_points: Public GitHub MCP install uses a local checkout with a workspace API key; @uploadcheck/cli and @uploadcheck/mcp are future npm packages after publish proof
Live Render API with inline media, signed upload, queued worker, and report endpoints
Public PASS, WATCH, and BLOCK sample reports
Cost guardrails that downgrade or block model-backed checks when they would break the 95% gross-margin target

distribution_position.current_install: public GitHub clone or local checkout
distribution_position.required_secret: workspace API key tied to included plan minutes or an operator-created account
distribution_position.directory_submission: after paid workspace proof, checkout/webhook proof, spend-alert proof, hosted MCP install proof, and external Claude Code/Codex/Cursor beta evidence
distribution_position.openai_connector: defer until hosted HTTPS MCP, account binding, report UX, and abuse/cost controls are proven in production

demo_flow.title: Preflight cost
demo_flow.script: Call qc_estimate_cost with the intended checks and plan. Show effective checks, removed checks, and margin safety before media is sent.

demo_flow.title: Run /check
demo_flow.script: Send a final video, podcast, Short, or still frame through UploadCheck using the CLI, MCP server, or REST API.

demo_flow.title: Show the block
demo_flow.script: Use the duplicate-crowd sample: UploadCheck blocks repeated faces and tells the editor to regenerate with more character variation.

demo_flow.title: Ask to fix now
demo_flow.script: Show every flag, separate direct fixes from render-source issues, ask whether to fix now, then rerun UploadCheck after edits.

pricing_position.creator: $99/mo for 2,400 checked minutes
pricing_position.margin_rule: Included minutes cover deterministic publish-readiness QC. Deep model review stays internal for engine backtesting, roadmap generation, and deterministic capture-rate measurement so public plans preserve the 95% gross-margin target.
pricing_position.stress_plan_verdict: $99 for 5,000 checked minutes is too generous for full-model review; public pricing stays deterministic QC minutes.

current_state_snapshot.note: Static snapshot only. Use live_launch_status before launch.
